scripts.deploy: npm run build && node scripts/dev.mjs wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=pixiedust-sys --commit-dirty=true
scripts.db:migrate: node scripts/dev.mjs wrangler d1 migrations apply pixiedust --remote
scripts.db:seed:local: wrangler d1 execute pixiedust --local --file=seed/seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute pixiedust --local --file=seed/migrate-templates.sql && wrangler d1 execute pixiedust --local --file=seed/seed-previews.sql && wrangler d1 execute pixiedust --local --command="INSERT OR IGNORE INTO users (uid,email,name,balance,is_admin,is_adult) VALUES ('2P84xTEyuXQoPUIknbZkDS40JdB2','claude.tester@pixiedust.dev','Claude Tester',1000,0,1),('7RkzBfyW7pW0cGhTV8exuhCXI6I3','claude.admin@pixiedust.dev','Claude Admin',1000,1,1);"
scripts.db:reset:local: npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:seed:local
